subcodes.first_line: There hath befallen Us in the path of God that which hath befallen no one before, whereupon they who were not did pass judgment upon Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ورد علینا فی سبیل الله ما لاورد علی احد من قبل بحیث حکم علینا من لم یکن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation
